member.name: M:MockDataGenerator.API.Controllers.GenerateController.Generate(MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.GenerateRequestDto)
member.summary: Generate mock data rows using Bogus.

member.name: T:MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.FieldConfigDto
member.summary: Represents a single field configuration sent from the frontend.

member.name: P:MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.FieldConfigDto.ColumnName
member.summary: The display name / column name (e.g. "Họ tên", "Email")

member.name: P:MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.FieldConfigDto.DataType
member.summary: The data type to use for generation (e.g. "Name", "Email", "Phone", "Address", "Date", "Custom Regex")

member.name: P:MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.FieldConfigDto.RegexPattern
member.summary: Optional regex pattern for "Custom Regex" type.

member.name: P:MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.FieldConfigDto.CustomListOptions
member.summary: Optional comma-separated list of values for "Custom List" type.

member.name: T:MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.GenerateRequestDto
member.summary: Request payload for POST /api/generate. Matches the frontend GenerateRequest type.

member.name: P:MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.GenerateRequestDto.Fields
member.summary: List of field configurations (columnName + dataType). Supported dataType values: Name, Email, Phone, Address, Date, FullName, FirstName, LastName, PhoneNumber, City, Country, ZipCode, Company, JobTitle, Username, Password, Url, Guid, Integer, Decimal, Boolean, Paragraph, Sentence, Word, AutoIncrement

member.name: P:MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.GenerateRequestDto.RowCount
member.summary: Number of rows to generate (1 – 10000). Mapped from frontend's "rowCount".

member.name: P:MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.GenerateRequestDto.FormatType
member.summary: Export format: json, csv, sql. Default is json.

member.name: P:MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.GenerateRequestDto.GenerationLocale
member.summary: Locale for data generation (e.g., en, zh_TW). Default is en.

member.name: P:MockDataGenerator.API.DTOs.GenerateRequestDto.DbDialect
member.summary: SQL Dialect: sqlserver, mysql, postgresql, mariadb.

member.name: P:MockDataGenerator.API.Models.Template.SchemaConfig
member.summary: JSON string describing the column configuration, e.g.: [{"columnName":"FullName","dataType":"string","generator":"fullName"}, ...]
